Class MediaView

java.lang.Object
uno.anahata.asi.agi.resource.view.AbstractResourceView
uno.anahata.asi.agi.resource.view.MediaView
All Implemented Interfaces:
ResourceView
public class MediaView extends AbstractResourceView
A resource view that interprets content as binary media (images, audio, etc.).

    The cached token count of this view's content under the active model.

    Method

    getTokenCount()
    Returns the token count for the current processed state of this view

    populateRag(RagMessage ragMessage)
    Populates the RAG message with the appropriate parts (Text or Blob).

    reload()
    Reloads and processes the content from the source.

    Methods inherited from class AbstractResourceView

    markDirty, resetTokenCount
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    markDirty()
    Triggers a markDirty on the owner resource to signal that the view's settings have changed and need re-interpretation, and clears the cached token count.
    void
    resetTokenCount()
    Resets the cached token count of this view, forcing a lazy recalculation on the next query.

    Methods inherited from class Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    default String
    getHeader()
    Returns a machine-readable header summarizing the interpretation state.
    default List<String>
    getInstructions()
    Provides system instructions if the resource is in that position.
    void
    setOwner(Resource owner)
    Associates this view with its parent resource.

  • Field Details

    • cachedData

      private transient byte[] cachedData
      Cached binary data.

  • Constructor Details

    • MediaView

      public MediaView()

  • Method Details

    • reload

      public void reload() throws Exception
      Reloads and processes the content from the source. This is called by the Resource orchestrator when the resource is stale or dirty.

      Implementation details: Reads all bytes from the handle. Includes a 10MB safety warning.

      Throws:
      Exception - if processing or reading fails.

    • populateRag

      public void populateRag(RagMessage ragMessage) throws Exception
      Populates the RAG message with the appropriate parts (Text or Blob).

      Implementation details: Adds the cached binary data as a BlobPart to the RAG message.

      Parameters:
      ragMessage - The target RAG message.
      Throws:
      Exception - if population fails.

    • getTokenCount

      public int getTokenCount()
      Returns the token count for the current processed state of this view. * * @return The token count.

      Performs a lazy, model-specific token calculation of the active media content, delegating to the selected model's generic raw bytes tokenizer.
